meta.project: Magic Agents Operator Workspace UI port

stories.title: Scaffold the React + TypeScript + Vite frontend
stories.notes: Created a new ui/ React + TypeScript + Vite workspace with lint, prettier, Vitest config, Vite API proxy, and FastAPI support for serving ui/dist assets when built. Backend contract tests pass; npm install/build is blocked in this environment.

stories.title: Establish a typed API client and query layer
stories.notes: Added a typed workspace API contract, JSON request helper, SSE adapter, query keys, and TanStack Query hooks for Jira intake and session start flows.

stories.title: Build the application shell and provider stack
stories.notes: Added AppProviders, ThemeProvider, router wiring, AppErrorBoundary, NotFoundView, AppShell, and a placeholder three-pane workspace route.

stories.title: Establish the tokenized visual system and typography rules
stories.notes: Added centralized CSS tokens for color, spacing, typography, radius, and motion plus global base styles that reserve mono typography for refs and code-like content.

stories.title: Build accessible UI primitives for the workspace
stories.notes: Added reusable Button, Badge, Text, MonoText, Divider, SectionHeader, Skeleton, EmptyState, Rail, WorkspaceSection, and ArtifactPanel primitives for the new shell.

stories.title: Implement the three-pane workspace layout
Add the sticky phase rail and session status strip
Replace screen jumps with panel state transitions
Add a top bar with session context and workspace controls
Support panel collapse, persistence, and responsive fallbacks
Unify Jira intake and manual entry in the left rail
Start, resume, and recover sessions from checkpoints
Model session state in React without UI drift
Render a phase-aware acceptance criteria checklist
Display a left-rail phase progress timeline
Surface session health and usage telemetry

epics.title: Active Phase Workspace and Negotiation Loop

Add inline approve and revise actions

Render the conversation transcript for the active phase
Add a sticky phase mini-rail and breadcrumb context
Build a tabbed inspector for evidence surfaces
Integrate codebase scan output into the inspector
Render per-AC traceability as linked evidence
Expose planner, critique, and spec diff as analyst tools
Add a spec contract viewer in the inspector
Integrate the EARS approval gate and execution controls
Add artifact viewers for specs and generated tests
Stream pipeline execution as a live console
Present verdicts and Jira feedback in one post-run surface
Establish the visual system and typography rules
Make the workspace accessible for keyboard and screen-reader users
Add restrained motion and responsive refinement
Add component, integration, and contract tests for the new UI
Cover the operator journey with browser-level end-to-end tests
Ship performance budgets and a safe rollout path
